推荐场景: 街采/短访谈｜表达个人观点
60秒任务: 「个人观点」：问题/观点/例子/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 访谈｜观点展开｜例证｜反方观点｜总结｜态度识别
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
From my perspective, ___.（表达观点）
I tend to think that ___.（温和立场）
My view has changed a little.（观点变化）
I used to believe ___, but now ___.（过去与现在）
What matters most to me is ___.（价值重点）
I’m not saying everyone should agree.（降低对抗）
For me, the key issue is ___.（核心问题）
I feel strongly about this because ___.（说明原因）
That’s a fair point, but I see it differently.（回应不同意见）
I’m still unsure about ___.（表达不确定）
I’d put it this way: ___.（重述观点）
It depends on the situation.（条件判断）
I can see both sides, but ___.（平衡后表态）
Personally, I’d choose ___.（个人选择）
That’s the part I find most convincing.（评价论点）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: perspective, view, issue, reason, situation, choice, belief, evidence
Verbs: believe, think, choose, agree, change, depend, convince, question
Adjectives / Tone: personal, fair, unsure, convinced, balanced, strongly held
Time / Place: now, before, over time, in my experience, in public
Chunks: from my perspective, see it differently, key issue, both sides, it depends
